proposals.reason: MDR/IVDR revision package published Dec 2025 clarifies software classification, MDR takes precedence over AI Act for integrated AI, new cyber notification regime added.

card.x: Proposal clarifies Annex VIII/Rule 11 software classification, MDR/IVDR takes precedence over AI Act for integrated AI (delays AI Act to Aug 2028), adds 30-day cyber incident notification via EUDAMED.

proposals.reason: Status confirmed as in-force with no extensions announced; existing devices registration deadline 28 Nov 2026 reaffirmed.

card.x: Four modules now mandatory: new devices must be registered before market entry; existing devices (on market before 28 May 2026) must register by 28 Nov 2026.

proposals.reason: New EU cybersecurity action plan for health sector published, establishes European center within ENISA, reinforces NIS2/MDR alignment.

card.x: Five-axis plan (prevent, detect, respond, recover, deter) establishes European health cyber center at ENISA; aligns NIS2, CRA, and MDR for medical device manufacturers.

proposals.reason: Approval vote underway since 22 May 2026, publication date confirmed as 12 Aug 2026.

card.x: Approval vote started 22 May 2026. Two Software Process Accuracy Levels replace three safety classes; scope expanded to all health software; AI/ML planning added. Publication 12 Aug 2026.

proposals.reason: AI Act Digital Omnibus formally adopted; high-risk AI obligations for medical devices delayed to 2 Aug 2028.

card.x: Digital Omnibus adopted: high-risk AI obligations for medical devices delayed to Aug 2028. MDCG 2025-6 / AIB 2025-1 joint guidance remains reference for MDR/AI Act articulation.
